endpoints.name: Discover Network Participant Existence
endpoints.description: Discover if a network participant exists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Discover Country Identifiers ** EXPERIMENTAL
endpoints.description: Discover the identifiers used in each country, for routing, for legal identification as well as for tax identification purposes. We are currently testing this endpoint with selected Customers. If you would like to participate, please contact us.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Disover Network Participant
endpoints.description: Discover a network participant and capabilities.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Submit a new document.
endpoints.description: Submit a document for delivery. This endpoint will replaces the /invoice_submissions endpoint which will soon be deprecated.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY.

endpoints.name: Get DocumentSubmission Evidence
endpoints.description: Get evidence for a DocumentSubmission by GUID with corresponding status
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY. Replace {{GUID}} with a real guid. Replace {{EVIDENCE_TYPE}} with a real evidence_type.

endpoints.name: Submit a new invoice
endpoints.description: DEPRECATED. Use the new /document_submissions endpoint. Submit an invoice for delivery.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY.

endpoints.name: DEPRECATED. Get InvoiceSubmission Evidence

endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY. Replace {{GUID}} with a real guid.

endpoints.name: Create a new AdditionalTaxIdentifier
endpoints.description: Create a new AdditionalTaxIdentifier. An AdditionalTaxIdentifier is a seconday tax identifier that is used inside the EU when sending invoices to consumers. In that case, the VAT of the receiving country is used and if the sender has a local VAT identifier, that is used to identifiy the sender, instead of the sender's origin country VAT number. To use these identifiers, use the invoice.consumerTaxMode = true property.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY. Replace {{LEGAL_ENTITY_ID}} with a real legal_entity_id.

endpoints.name: Get AdditionalTaxIdentifier
endpoints.description: Get an AdditionalTaxIdentifier
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY. Replace {{LEGAL_ENTITY_ID}} with a real legal_entity_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: Delete AdditionalTaxIdentifier
endpoints.description: Delete an AdditionalTaxIdentifier
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY. Replace {{LEGAL_ENTITY_ID}} with a real legal_entity_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY. Replace {{LEGAL_ENTITY_ID}} with a real legal_entity_id. Replace {{ID}} with a real id.

endpoints.name: GET a WebhookInstance
endpoints.description: GET a WebhookInstance from the queue. After processing it successfully, DELETE it and GET the next one. When a 204 is received, the queue is empty and the polling process can sleep for a while.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY.

endpoints.name: DELETE a WebhookInstance
endpoints.description: DELETE a specific WebhookInstance
endpoints.notes: Replace {{STORECOVE_API_KEY}} with your STORECOVE API KEY. Replace {{GUID}} with a real guid.
